REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Aug-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Andrew Schultz, Esq., for Elyse Crum, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports on the issue regarding the bond and notice issues and advises that he intends to address them forthwith.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Aug-19-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To Apr-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Feb-08-1995 is admitted to probate. Elyse Crum is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed, with full authority. Bond is set at $409,000.00. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-25-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.
